text:
There were two mice out searching for nuts. They were hungry. They stumbled upon an old oak tree. They climbed up.

Suddenly a squirrel swooped down.

"No!" scream the mice.

But that's just what it did.

They froze. That's where the squirrel landed.

It scooped up both mice.

With a chew.

They weren't dead. They just hated squirrels.

They hopped back home.

That's all.
